subcodes.first_line: O serene and sacred leaf! Praise be to God that household is under the shelter of the Lord, and that lineage belongeth to His hosts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه مطمئنه قدسیه الحمد لله آن خانمان در پناه حضرت یزدانند و آن دودمان جنود
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @firmness in the Covenant, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @service to others; to the Cause of God
